{{Infobox artifact
| name = Kyraxian Spirit-Orbs
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Kyraxian Spirit-Orbs]] are expensive components used in the ritual to achieve reflections.}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The ritual aims to use [[Kyraxian Spirit-Orbs]] to achieve five reflections.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
